title: Cyanus akcadaghensis
taxonomy: Cyanus akcadaghensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is classified as a member of the genus Cyanus, which is a group of plants closely related to the dandelion. The genus Cyanus is further categorized within the tribe Cichorieae, a group of plants that also includes chicory and endive. At the higher taxonomic ranks, Cyanus akcadaghensis is placed within the subfamily Cichorioideae, a group of plants that are characterized by their composite flower heads. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other members of the Asteraceae family.
